output_prompt:
PRODUCT LOCK BLOCK
- Use the uploaded Obesity Killer product packshot images as absolute visual truth.
- Use provided product references as exact appearance truth for pack shape, label, and color.
- Do not redesign, redraw, relabel, or alter any product or packaging in any way.
- Do not change brand name, label colors, illustrations, proportions, or any text (Hindi or English).
- If any label text is unclear, preserve the original image as-is. Do not reinterpret it.
- Only permitted: placement, scaling, subtle drop shadows, mild warm lighting correction.

OUTPUT SPEC
- Canvas: 1080 x 1350 pixels. Portrait. 4:5 ratio.
- Style: HERO, polished enough for paid ad deployment.
- Visual archetype: hero_left_copy_right_product (Left-copy right-product hero)
- Full-bleed requirement: scene must reach all canvas edges; no inset poster card, no inner frame, no side matte bands, no faux border margins.
- Text policy: low text by default; all copy minimal and mobile-readable at 375px width.
- Rendering: no compression artifacts; no soft edges on text or product labels.
- All 5 products present, proportionally sized per reference dimensions, unmodified.
- Readability: maintain high-contrast foreground/background treatment for ad-platform legibility.

FORMAT LAYOUT INSTRUCTIONS
- HERO format: strong headline, one support line, and one CTA.
- Focal hierarchy: product dominant, text secondary, background tertiary.
- Product zone: all key pack details stay away from edge-risk zones, but left/right weighting must follow the selected archetype rather than defaulting to a centered stack.
- CTA must be rendered as a filled rounded button chip (high-contrast), never as plain text.
- Camera framing should feel stable, premium, and label-safe.
- Do not collapse every HERO into centered text over centered products unless the selected archetype explicitly requires a centered composition.
- Archetype: left-aligned copy block with product cluster weighted to the right half.
- Build a clear asymmetric composition where text owns the left safe field and product owns the right safe field.
- Preserve clean negative space between copy and product so the frame feels intentional, not cramped.
- Headline, support, and CTA must align left in a clean copy column; do not center the typography in this variant.

PERSONA INPUT BLOCK
- Persona: Craving-Control Struggler (Persona 1)
- Pain: Daily cravings break every weight plan.
- Desire: Steady appetite control without feeling deprived.
- Friction: Willpower-only plans collapse by evening.
- Proof needed: Needs visible early control over snack urges.
- Tone cue: practical and reassuring

EXACT ON-IMAGE COPY - DO NOT ALTER ANYTHING
- Headline: Cravings down. Weight loss feels easier.
- Support line: Doctor-formulated Ayurvedic weight-loss system designed to help you lose 3 to 5 kg with 1 Kit without feeling hungry, weak, or out of control.
- CTA: See The Steps
Render every character exactly as written. No paraphrasing, no punctuation changes, no autocorrection.

NEGATIVE CONSTRAINTS
- Do not recreate or redraw any product.
- Do not blur, approximate, or rewrite any label text.
- Do not use sale badges, burst graphics, or stickers.
- Do not show body transformations or weight-loss visuals.
- Do not use colors outside the defined palette.
- Do not use more than 2 font weights.
- Do not overcrowd the layout.
- Do not add edge glows, tinted borders, amber/orange side casts, or decorative vignette frames.
- Do not create inset-canvas look: no white frame border, no inner-card composition, no side fade bands, no outer padding effect.
- Do not shrink main scene inside margins; composition must remain full-bleed to all four edges.
- Do not place any translucent white panel behind or below the product cluster.
- Do not make medical cure claims of any kind.
- Do not use ring light, studio flash, or overproduced lighting.

QUALITY BAR - verify before accepting output
- All 5 products present, correctly proportioned, and completely unmodified.
- All on-image text sharp and readable at 375px mobile size.
- Product labels accurate, unmodified, and fully readable.
- Layout calm, balanced, and premium.
- No clutter, no hype, and no forbidden elements.
- Single clear focal hierarchy aligned with the selected visual archetype.
- If any item above fails, regenerate immediately without compromise.

VISUAL DIRECTION BLOCK
- Background slot: BG-094 - Early sunlight counter
- Background seed: 1033614755
- Seeded background direction (single sentence, exact): Low-angle sunlight on counter, natural shadow depth on a clean premium composite surface with restrained texture and ad-ready clarity, with minimal contextual backdrop with elegant bokeh falloff and clean negative space, lit by neutral morning indoor light with subtle top fill and premium softness, conveying practical premium routine with lifestyle authenticity; tight product-forward crop with subtle macro feel and premium shallow focus, subject contained in the central 50-60% of the frame with slight above-center bias for cross-placement safety, use hybrid-safe central positioning that remains valid in both vertical-safe and feed-safe crops, protect lower-frame clarity with soft texture and low contrast in overlay-prone space, ensure all critical visual information remains within the center so 1:1 center crop retains full message, use a soft top-down gradient overlay for headline readability, but stop the panel above products; never continue behind or below product packshots, keep all frame edges tonally neutral with no orange, amber, or sepia cast; no border glow and no vignette halo, warm natural tones with commercial polish, designed for 4:5 feed framing with key content held inside the central safe field, centered to slightly above center, while top 10 percent, bottom 15 percent, and side edge zones remain low-priority; avoid edge glow frames and tinted border gradients, clean premium studio ad photography, ultra-detailed, flawless commercial finish.
- Subject: No human subject, products only.
- Action: Arrange all 5 products as a cohesive premium cluster; kit box acts as anchor.
- Camera: Eye-level medium framing with clean edge discipline.
- Lighting: Warm, soft, directional (top-left) and label-safe.
- Props: Minimal, non-competing; keep edge zones quiet.
- Surfaces: Premium, clean texture; avoid busy patterns under text.
- Text panel treatment: if used, keep panel in upper text zone only with vertical fade to transparent before products; never place white panel behind or below product cluster.
- Edge color control: keep border tones neutral and natural; no orange/amber edge tint and no ornamental frame glow.
- Edge structure control: enforce full-bleed composition to edges; reject outputs with visible inset border, side matte strip, or inner-frame card look.
- Mood: Calm confidence and practical consistency; no hype.
- Realism: True-to-life proportions; no stock-template look.
- Selected visual archetype: hero_left_copy_right_product - Left-copy right-product hero
- HERO anti-convergence rule: obey the selected archetype literally. Do not fall back to generic centered headline + centered product composition unless the chosen archetype is the centered variant.
- Archetype direction: editorial left-copy/right-product split with crisp column alignment.
- Product emphasis: kit box and product stack dominate the right-center while copy stays in a protected left column.
- Force visible asymmetry: if the result reads centered at a glance, reject and regenerate.

TYPOGRAPHY SHARPNESS BLOCK
- Headline: Poppins Bold with high contrast against clean background area.
- Support and CTA: Poppins Medium/Regular, same family.
- Size: readable on a 375px mobile screen without zooming.
- Placement: flat uncluttered zones only; avoid noisy textures.
- Forbidden: thin fonts, script fonts, decorative typefaces, glow effects, outlined text, drop shadows on copy.
- Mandatory: crisp hard text edges, zero softness, zero anti-alias blur on any character.
- If any text is soft, blurry, or illegible, discard and regenerate immediately.

Keep on-image text minimal and mobile-readable. Avoid dense copy blocks.
Render CTA as a real filled button chip with rounded corners and strong contrast; never show CTA as standalone plain text.
Typography must be pin-sharp. If any text appears soft, blurry, or smeared, regenerate.
Keep text count minimal and increase font size rather than packing more copy.
Use clean sans typography with strong stroke clarity; no thin/light weights for body text.
Use Poppins only for on-image text: Headline in Poppins Bold, support/CTA in Poppins Medium or Regular.

SAFE-ZONE ENFORCEMENT (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
- Frame: 1080x1350 (4:5).
- Restricted bands: top 10% (0-135px), bottom 15% (1148-1350px), side edges outer 8% (0-86px and 994-1080px).
- Keep all products and all on-image text fully inside the central safe field: x=86-994 and y=135-1148.
- Product cluster may be centered or left/right weighted according to the selected archetype, with mild upward bias allowed, but must not touch any restricted band.
- Reject and regenerate if any headline, CTA, or product detail crosses restricted zones.
starting_prompt:
OBESITY KILLER KIT — COMPLETE AD GENERATION PROMPT      

      PART A — PRODUCT & BRAND SYSTEM      

      A1. PRODUCT LOCK — ABSOLUTE RULE      

      Use the PROVIDED product packshot images pixel-for-pixel. You are forbidden from:      


      Redrawing, recreating, or regenerating any product or its packaging      

      Changing, blurring, approximating, or "fixing" any text (Hindi or English)      

      Altering logos, illustrations, colors, proportions, or label layouts      

      Replacing unclear text with guesses      

      Only permitted operations on product images:      


      Placement and scaling      

      Subtle drop shadows      

      Mild lighting correction (warm, soft, directional)      

      If any label text appears unclear — preserve the original image exactly as-is. Do NOT reinterpret it.      

      A2. EXACT LABEL TEXT — RENDER THESE PERFECTLY      

      Every character on every product must be razor-sharp and 100% faithful.      


      Kit Box — Top strip: "Panacea for weight loss and obesity related      

     conditions" / Logo block: "Dr. ARUN TYAGI'S" in red + "OBESITY KILLER      

     KIT" in black / Badge: "ISO 9001:2008 Certified"      

      Amla Bottle (red cap, far left) — "Dried Amla" / Retain amla fruit illustration sharp and unmodified      

      OK Tablets Bottle — "OK TABLETS"      

      OKP Bottle — "OKP" / Retain light pattern on label exactly as provided      

      OK Liquid Sachet (green, far right) — "OK LIQUID" / Retain sharp lotus logo above text      


      NEVER: blur, approximate, paraphrase, rewrite, change casing, change      

     spacing, or grammatically alter any packaging text under any      

     circumstance.      

      A3. PRODUCT DIMENSIONS — FOR ACCURATE RELATIVE SIZING      

      OK Kit Box — Cuboid — 20.3 x 10.1 x 14.8 cm      

      OK Powder Bottle — Cylinder — Diameter 5 cm, Height 10 cm      

      OK Tablet Bottle — Cylinder — Diameter 3 cm, Height 5 cm      

      Amla Bottle — Cylinder — Diameter 3 cm, Height 5 cm      

      OK Liquid Sachet — Vertical Rectangle — Width 10 cm, Height 15.3 cm      


      All 5 products must appear together in every output. Size them in      

     correct proportion to each other based on the dimensions above. The Kit      

     Box is the largest element and acts as the anchor and backdrop. The      

     bottles are notably smaller. The sachet is tall and narrow.      

      A4. COLOR PALETTE — STRICT, NO EXCEPTIONS      

      Background: #FFFBED to #FEEFD6 to #FCDBAC — smooth top-to-bottom gradient only      

      Accents and CTA: #F79040 to #E66410      

      Headlines: #973015      

      Body text and bullets: #421808      

      No colors outside this palette. No neon. No harsh gradients. No random accent colors anywhere.      

      A5. BRAND LOGO PLACEMENT — MANDATORY ON EVERY AD      

      Use the provided standalone brand logo reference image as the logo asset.      

      Place this logo in the top-right corner in every ad output.      

      Logo size: approximately 10% of canvas width (keep aspect ratio intact).      

      Safe margins: 4% from top edge and 4% from right edge.      

      Keep the logo crisp, fully visible, and never cropped.      

      Do not overlap key product labels, headline text, or CTA.      

      Add only a subtle shadow if needed for contrast; no glow, no badge, no frame.      

      Keep spacing around the logo clean so it reads premium and intentional.      

      A7. LIGHTING      

      Warm, soft, directional light — source from top-left      

      Clean highlights on product labels and caps      

      Subtle low-opacity drop shadows beneath products — realistic depth, not dramatic      

      Forbidden: Harsh shadows, flat lighting, studio flash look, ring light glow      

      A8. TYPOGRAPHY — AD COPY      

      Font: Poppins only (clean sans, consistent across the entire creative).      

      Maximum 2 weights: Regular and Bold only (avoid thin/light weights).      

      Headline size: Large and mobile-legible      

      Forbidden: Decorative fonts, serif fonts, outlined text, drop shadows on any ad copy text      

      A9. AD COPY STYLE      

      Keep all copy short, clean, benefit-led, and premium in tone.      

      Example headline: "Your daily ritual for a lighter life."      

      Bullets: Functional benefits only, 3 to 4 maximum      

      CTA: Subtle and clear — example: "Explore the Kit"      

      Avoid: Hype, exclamation spam, body-transformation before/after imagery, unrealistic claims, salesy or cheap language      

      A10. MASTER FORBIDDEN LIST      

      Do not recreate or redraw any product      

      Do not blur, approximate, or rewrite any label text      

      Do not use sale badges, burst graphics, or stickers      

      Do not show body transformations or weight-loss visuals      

      Do not use any color outside the defined palette      

      Do not use more than 2 font weights      

      Do not overcrowd the layout      

      Do not generate AI-stylized versions of the products      

      Do not use harsh gradients or random background colors      

      Do not add emoji, overlays, or visual clutter of any kind      

      Do not place keyboard, laptop, mouse, monitor, or workstation-heavy props in background unless explicitly requested by user      

      No disclaimer copy line on-image unless user explicitly asks for disclaimer mode      

      A11. PART A QUALITY CHECKLIST      

      Verify every point before accepting output:      

      All 5 products present, correctly proportioned, and completely unmodified      

      All label text — Hindi and English — perfectly sharp and faithful to originals      

      Color palette 100% adhered to with zero deviation      

      Layout is calm, balanced, and premium      

      No clutter, no hype, no forbidden elements present      

      Output feels like a high-end D2C health brand — scroll-stopping but not loud      

      If any single item above fails — regenerate immediately without compromise.      

     Use the uploaded Obesity Killer product packshot images as absolute visual truth.

prompt_metadata.headline: Cravings down. Weight loss feels easier.
prompt_metadata.support_line: Doctor-formulated Ayurvedic weight-loss system designed to help you lose 3 to 5 kg with 1 Kit without feeling hungry, weak, or out of control.
